expected_detections.description: Role hijacking - 'Act as' prompt injection in roleplay
Multiple 'act as' patterns in roleplay modes

attack_chain: Disguised as roleplay tool -> Uses 'Act as' to inject identity changes -> Claims restrictions don't apply to 'character' -> Attempts to bypass safety through fictional framing
deception_technique: Hidden within 'roleplay scenarios' that use character immersion as excuse to bypass restrictions
